## Summary

Describe the collection or correction.

## Checklist

- [ ] I used primary source links where possible.
- [ ] Source publisher and homepage are present.
- [ ] License/attribution terms are present, or the record explains why they are unknown.
- [ ] Required attribution is preserved if provided by the source.
- [ ] No-endorsement language is present.
- [ ] Every non-obvious claim cites a ref from a `refs[]` pool.
- [ ] Reviewed summaries cite the source facts that support them.
- [ ] Raw object examples are not included unless `sample_policy` allows them.
- [ ] Sensitive object paths, personal identifiers, and raw content samples are not included.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_registry.py` passes.

## Source References

List the key source references added or changed (use the kebab-case `refs[]` ids).
